subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! These are servants who have assembled in the Spiritual Assembly with radiant faces, humbly supplicating unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: إلهی إلهی هؤلاء عباد اجتمعوا فی المحفل الروحاني بوجه نوراني متضرعين اليک
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters
